name: Talon Capital Corp.
summary: Overview Talon Capital Corp. (the Company) is a blank check company, or special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), incorporated on May1, 2025, as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or other similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this report as our initial business combination.
